holdings.infoBox: SPMO is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 10.70%, NVIDIA at 8.11%, Broadcom at 6.40%, Alphabet at 4.49%, and Johnson & Johnson at 4.06%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Momentum ETF (SPMO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Momentum index. The fund tracks an index of 100 S&P 500 components with the strongest volatility-adjusted momentum. SPMO was launched on Oct 9, 2015 and is issued by Invesco.
